reverse-engineer.description: Reverse engineers the live Shopify site (www.homeu.ph) and generates complete migration data for Payload CMS

shopify-reverse-engineer.description: Reverse engineer Shopify site with Playwright scanner + Ollama vision (llava:7b), parse exports, and generate Payload CMS migration data

reverse-engineer.description: Run the full Shopify reverse engineering pipeline
reverse-engineer.prompt: Load the shopify-reverse-engineer skill and execute all phases: 1) Playwright scan with screenshots + Ollama vision, 2) Parse Shopify exports, 3) Generate Payload CMS import data, 4) Validate completeness.

playwright-scan.description: Scan www.homeu.ph with Playwright + take screenshots + Ollama vision analysis
playwright-scan.prompt: Run the Playwright scanner on www.homeu.ph with screenshots enabled. Then analyze key screenshots with Ollama llava:7b for visual structure extraction. Save all output to tools/playwright-scanner/output/.

parse-shopify-export.description: Parse Shopify products CSV, theme, and images from input/ folder
parse-shopify-export.prompt: Run tools/shopify-import/parser.mjs to parse any Shopify exports in tools/shopify-import/input/ and generate Payload CMS compatible data.
